docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN DIEGO MAYFLOWER/SAN DIEGO VAN & STORAGE CO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,752.00 FILED BY WILNER, MIRIAM AS TO DEFENDANT SAN DIEGO MAYFLOWER/SAN DIEGO VAN & STORAGE CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
